title: glechoma erecta
intro: Glechoma erecta, also known as Creeping Thyme or Wild Thyme, is a low-growing, perennial herb native to Europe and Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Glechoma erecta include its ability to soothe respiratory issues, such as coughs and colds, as well as its potential to reduce stress and improve digestion. The herbal preparations of Glechoma erecta include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by steeping the leaves and flowers in hot water or a solvent like ethanol.
